WARNING: MacBook Air 13-inch M3 (X2819/MLB). NOT Pro, NOT M4.

power_enables.name: P3V8AON_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON VR enable - gates the main PP3V8_AON rail

power_enables.name: P5VS2_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 5V S2 VR enable - gates PP5V_S2 from UC300. Gated through UC637/UC630 logic.

power_enables.name: EDP_PANEL_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V3 S2 / panel power enable - gates PP3V3_S2 from UC710

power_enables.name: IPD_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: IPD power enable - gates all IPD load switches via UC870 AND gate

power_enables.name: CHGR_AUX_OK
power_enables.description: Charger AUX OK - indicates charger is ready

power_enables.name: PBUS_AONSW_LCD_1A
power_enables.description: LCD backlight PBUS load switch enable

power_good_fault.name: P3V8AON_FAULT_L
power_good_fault.description: 3V8 AON fault indicator. Fault pull-down current 1-3mA typical.

power_good_fault.name: PMU_ACTIVE_READY
power_good_fault.description: PMU active ready - indicates PMU completed startup

resets.name: PMU_RESET_L
resets.description: PMU reset line - master reset for MPMU

resets.name: MPMU_CRASH_L
resets.description: MPMU crash signal. Routed via R8564 to SPMU.

resets.name: SOC_FORCE_DFU
resets.description: Force DFU mode - puts SoC into Device Firmware Update mode

resets.name: PMU_UPC_FORCE_DFU
resets.description: PMU UPC Force DFU signal. Via R8562/R8563 resistors. >> PU LDO9.

resets.name: ATCRTMR0_RESET_L
resets.description: ATC retimer 0 reset. Sequenced: deasserts 11ms after VDDC_EN.

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C1
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 1 - SPKAWP I2C (speaker amps)

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C2
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 2 - ATCRTMR I2C (USB-C retimers)

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C3
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 3 - SPKAWP R CODEC I2C (right speaker codec)

i2c_buses.name: DISP_I2C
i2c_buses.description: Display I2C - via UD050 level shifter (NQSFVF)

i2c_buses.name: ISP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: ISP I2C bus 0 - Camera I2C (via UD120 level shifter)

i2c_buses.name: AOP_I2CM0
i2c_buses.description: AOP I2C master bus 0 - ALS I2C (via UD140 level shifter)

i2c_buses.name: SEP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: SEP I2C bus 0 - EEPROM (U1950) at address 0x71/0x43

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C1
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 1 - Charger, Battery, PMU I2C. Multiple devices.

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C2
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 2 - NDB temperature sensor (via UD220)

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C3
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 3 - DPS/STMP I2C (via UD230 level shifter)

spi_buses.name: SPI UPC0
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF400 (ATC0) firmware ROM (via UF250/UF260)

spi_buses.name: SPI UPC5
spi_buses.description: SPI to MagSafe ACE3 (U5900) firmware ROM (via J5602)

sensor_adc.name: PPBUS VSENSE (VP0R)
sensor_adc.description: PPBUS voltage sensor. Gain 0.11.30V, Range 14.05V, RC 1.06ms

sensor_adc.name: DCIN VSENSE (VD0R)
sensor_adc.description: DC input voltage sensor. Gain 0.03524, RC 1.12ms, Range 22.29V

sensor_adc.name: DCIN ISENSE (ID0R)
sensor_adc.description: DC input current sensor. Charger Gain 20x, EDP 4.2A, RSENSE 0.010 (RD220). RC 1.10ms

sensor_adc.name: BMON ISENSE (IPBR)
sensor_adc.description: Battery monitor current sensor. Charger Gain 1x, EDP 8.48A, RSENSE 0.005 (RD505). RC 1.10ms

sensor_adc.name: 5V_S2_VR ISENSE (IO5R)
sensor_adc.description: 5V S2 VR high-side current sensor. Gain 50x, EDP 3.78A @ 5.15V. UD550.

sensor_adc.name: 3V3_SW_LCD ISENSE (IO3R)
sensor_adc.description: 3V3 SW LCD VR high-side current sensor. Gain 50x, Short 0.9.8MOhm. UD560.

sensor_adc.name: LCD_BKLT ISENSE (IBLR)
sensor_adc.description: LCD backlight high-side current sensor. Gain 50x, EDP 0.150A @ 46V. UD6C0.

sensor_adc.name: WLAN_BT_3V8 ISENSE (IW3C)
sensor_adc.description: WLAN/BT 3V8 AON current sensor. Gain 25x, EDP 1.818A @ 3.8V. UD810.

sensor_adc.name: KBD_LED_5V ISENSE (IKBC)
sensor_adc.description: Keyboard LED 5V current sensor. Gain 100x, EDP 0.183A @ 30V. UD880.

sensor_adc.name: Iceman VMEAS (VMVC)
sensor_adc.description: Iceman (3V8 AON main) voltage sensor. Gain 0.838x, Vmax 3.8V, Range 3.2-3.6V.
